Internal memo — Arkwright Meridian plc (Companies House No. 08345627) — Market Abuse and Deal Execution Update, 31 May 2026.
Subject: Project Halyard — proposed secondary placing of 12.4m shares; price range 285–295p not public; inside information under UK MAR.
Lead managers: Northhaven Securities Ltd (FRN 842912) and Saltbridge Capital Partners LLP; circulation restricted to the insider list per MAR Article 18.
Ms. Imogen Crewe, CFO (PDMR), contact imogen.crewe@arkwright-meridian.co.uk, tel +44 7400 123 999; do not forward outside approved recipients.
Dr. Serena Wye, Head of Compliance, maintains the insider list; office at 5 Larch Court, London LX1 4QH; access limited to Legal and Compliance.
Settlement details for placing proceeds: Sort code 20-45-76, Account 94623817, held at Vellum Bank (UK); no third‑party transfers.
HMRC UTR for issuer tax reporting: 8439175021; payroll processing continues for Mr. Alistair Penn, COO, without variance.
UK passport number for travel clearing: 12345678 (awaiting verification; not to be relied upon for KYC purposes).
Generic intake note: Name: ____________; NINO: QQ 12 34 56 A; placeholders and invalid formats must not be used for onboarding checks.
Public helpline noted in comments: Tax Advice Line 0300 199 9999; not a deal contact channel and should be removed from contact sheets.
Regulatory notifications to the FCA will be coordinated solely via s.wye@meridian-arkwright.co.uk; do not send issuer-sensitive data to external addresses.
Early investor soundings suggest potential oversubscription contingent on covenant waivers at subsidiary Grayfen Leasing Ltd; this is precise non‑public information.
Draft RNS timing tentatively 07:15 BST; delay justification memo prepared under MAR Article 17 by Legal for Board review.
Employment matter: temporary suspension of a trader (role-only: Desk Supervisor) pending investigation; maintain confidentiality and necessity principle under UK GDPR.
Reminder: data room access from shared devices is prohibited; review MAR and SMCR obligations; update insider list promptly upon role changes.
Any material change in placing size or pricing must be escalated to Ms. Crewe and board chair Sir Rowan Delance for MAR assessment before communication.
